'''Olodondo Berzix''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Selkath/Legends|Selkath]] who was the unscrupulous owner of [[Ahto Luxury Resorts]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. He had an office in [[Ahto City#Ahto East|East Ahto]] and published the ''[[Guide to Beautiful Manaan]]''.
